commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d64fc1ec1c81f4b217b4acfcf8547b4d5062e563)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an authenticated `GET /api/v1/stars` endpoint, a `list-stars` CLI command, response schema/docs, and schema/CLI tests for listing a user's highlighted skills.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug report; this is a feature PR. The blocking patch defects are source-reproducible from PR head: the new handler references an unimported helper, `convex/stars.ts` duplicates imports, and the shared schema test imports a missing export.
commands.review_followup: Human handling is needed because the feature adds a new authenticated read boundary and needs contributor-provided real behavior proof; the code fixes are narrow but not enough to make the PR mergeable alone.

target.title: feat: add GET /api/v1/stars endpoint and list-stars CLI command
target.body: ## 📦 Pull Request ## Summary Adds a GET /api/v1/stars endpoint and list-stars CLI command, completing the stars API alongside the existing star and unstar endpoints. ## Reason for adding I’ve been highlighting various skills that I haven't installed, and I would like my agent to be able to view the starred skills in the highlight section from the command line. ## ✅ Checklist Before Merging Code ### Code - [x] runs locally without errors - [x] My code has no unused or commented-out sections. - [x] I have reviewed my code. ### Testing - [x] All tests are passing. - [x] I have added or updated tests as needed. ## 🧪 Type of Change - [x] 🚀 New feature - [ ] 🐛 Bug fix - [ ] 🧹 Refactor - [ ] 📝 Documentation - [ ] 🔧 Configuration ## 🛠️ Implements / Fixes Implements the missing GET /api/v1/stars endpoint and corresponding CLI command. Added starsGetRouterV1Handler in convex/httpApiV1.ts 📋 Description of Changes * Added starsGetRouterV1Handler to convex/httpApiV1/starsV1.ts — handles GET /api/v1/stars, returns all starred skills for the authenticated user using the read rate limit bucket. * Added listStarsByUserInternal internal query to convex/stars.ts— fetches all stars for a given user * Added ApiV1StarsListResponseSchema to packages/schema/src/schemas.ts and packages/clawhub/src/schema/schemas.ts * Added cmdListStars command to packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/listStars.ts * Added tests for schema validation in packages/schema/src/schemas.test.ts. * Added tests for the CLI command in packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/listStars.test.ts. 🧪 Testing Notes - [ ] No tests needed - [ ] Some tests changed (explain why) - [x] All/most tests changed (please describe) Added two new test files: * packages/schema/src/schemas.test.ts — 5 tests covering valid responses, optional fields, null values, empty arrays, and invalid input rejection for ApiV1StarsListResponseSchema. * packages/clawhub/src/cli/commands/listStars.test.ts — tests covering authenticated requests, count messaging (singular/plural/empty), per-skill output with each, and error handling. *All existing tests continue to pass. Verified with `bun run lint && bun run test && bun run build`.* ### Usage ```bash clawhub list-stars ``` `clawhub list-stars` with results: ```bash ⠋ Fetching starred skills from your highlights ✔ Found 3 starred skills in your highlights padel Padel Assistant go-home Go Home weather Weather CLI ``` `clawhub list-stars` with no stars: ```bash ⠋ Fetching starred skills from your highlights ✔ Found 0 starred skills in your highlights ``` `clawhub list-stars` unauthenticated: ```bash ⠋ Fetching starred skills from your highlights ✖ Unauthorized ``` ### Notes * Follows the same auth and rate limiting patterns as the existing starsPostRouterV1Handler and starsDeleteRouterV1Handler #### Local Dev Environment **Start local instance:** ```bash # Terminal A — Convex backend cd ~/clawhub && bunx convex dev --typecheck=disable # Terminal B — Frontend cd ~/clawhub && bun run dev -- --port 3000 ``` **Ports:** - `3000` — Frontend (Vite dev server) - `3210` — Convex backend API (NOT for HTTP actions) - `3211` — Convex site-proxy → **this is where all HTTP actions live** **Test CLI against local:** ```bash CLAWHUB_REGISTRY=http://127.0.0.1:3211 CLAWHUB_SITE=http://localhost:3000 bun clawhub ``` **Login locally (browser flow is broken — use token):** 1. Go to `http://localhost:3000` → log in → Settings → API tokens → create one 2. `CLAWHUB_REGISTRY=http://127.0.0.1:3211 bun clawhub login --token ` **Why browser login doesn't work locally:** `public/.well-known/clawhub.json` is a static file hardcoded to `https://clawhub.ai`. Discovery picks this up and overrides `CLAWHUB_SITE`, so the browser opens prod auth. Fix: use `--token` workaround or temporarily edit the static file (don't commit). **Seed local DB:** ```bash bunx convex run --no-push devSeed:seedNixSkills # 3 sample skills bunx convex run --no-push devSeedExtra:seedExtraSkillsInternal # 50 more (optional) bunx convex run --no-push statsMaintenance:updateGlobalStatsInternal # refresh count # Reset and re-seed: bunx convex run --no-push devSeed:seedNixSkills '{"reset": true}' ``` **Common gotcha:** `convex dev` may show schema.ts diffs with `agenticRiskFindings`/`riskSummary` — unrelated noise, discard with `git restore convex/schema.ts`. **CONTRIBUTING.md has a potential bug:** Example uses port `3210` for `CLAWHUB_REGISTRY` — should be `3211`. > ⚠️ AI Disclosure: This PR was developed with AI assistance (Claude). I reviewed all generated code, ran the test suite, and manually verified the CLI wiring against the live registry. I understand the changes and can maintain them.
target.author: djc00p

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
